title: MD Pages and MD Plans Improvements

texts: Gifts: Added 'Event Reward' and 'Hidden' tags. Added events to the expanded modals for event reward gifts.
MD Plans: Added adversities support for extreme difficulty
MD Plans: Added skill replacements support
Achievement Tracker: Optimized to load faster and reduce memory usage.
Achievement Tracker: Modified how gifts are displayed. They should take up significantly less space now. Also removed hidden gifts.
Theme Packs Page: Reworked to make it more in line with the newer pages.
Achievement Tracker: Added a small snippet to click a category when opening it for the first time.
Fixed Still-warm Coffee and Bongy Plush not being set as exclusive to their respective theme packs.
Fixed issue where selecting damage type keywords for MD Plans didn't retain them after saving.
Fixed potential issue in my posts page that could cause posts to fail to load when first opening it (switching tabs would fix the issue previously).
Fixed potential issue in spec build MD Plans that could cause it to fail to load right after updating or publishing (refresh resolved it previously).
Prevent modals (mainly gift modals) from becoming too wide.
